title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 521.150 - Original writs, how issued and returned
text:
521.150.  Original writs, how issued and returned. — Original writs of attachment shall be issued and returned in like time and manner as ordinary writs of summons.
(RSMo 1939 § 1459) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1295; 1919 § 1746; 1909 § 2315
